Description: Core Pomodoro timer (Focus/Short Break/Long Break), background execution, notifications, session logging, and session history. Two-tap start flow. Timer drift < 1s over 30 min.
Daily streak tracking, milestone unlocks (3/7/14/30/60), XP and coin economy, streak freeze policy, and reward reveal animations.
Base character selection, trait customization, equipment slots, layered 2D sprite rendering, animations (idle/celebrate/focus/rest), inventory grid, coin purchases, rarity tiers, and launch catalog.
Daily and weekly quest system, quest rewards, stats dashboard (today/7-day/all-time), session history timeline, and milestone progress tracker.

On-device AI coaching across three waves. W1: intent framing, post-session reflection, streak rescue nudge. W2: adaptive duration and break recommendations. W3: character voice and weekly recaps. Offline-first with deterministic fallbacks.
iPad layout adaptation, Split View/Slide Over support, CloudKit sync for all core models, merge conflict resolution, and offline-to-online recovery.
VoiceOver labels, Dynamic Type, WCAG AA contrast, reduce-motion alternatives, and full VoiceOver end-to-end verification.
P0/P1 defect resolution, crash-free rate >= 99.5% in beta, end-to-end flow verification on iPhone and iPad, App Store listing, and submission.
FocusForge+ subscription via StoreKit 2 for premium stats and cosmetic tracks. Non-randomized cosmetic bundles. No ads during focus sessions.
